description: Stage 1 curated architecture corpus for designing the integrated supervisory lane. The attached entries provide a broad picture of the current runner contract and also expose this pack's own real scaffold surfaces so the architecture can reason about how scaffold creation and scaffold review should be automated using actual in-repo prompts, manifests, tool profiles, workflow settings, and acceptance schema. Non-core development-only eval surfaces are excluded. The synthetic example pack remains attached as bounded low-authority structure evidence for current task-pack authoring patterns.

primary_job_inputs.notes: authoritative task statement and supervisory-lane requirements
authoritative operator workflow, review discipline, and failure-recovery requirements
authoritative final output contract for the drop-in-ready package

attached_repository_files.notes: top-level operating contract for the standalone runner repository
recommended reading order and core mental model for the current engine
operator runbook for run, review, resume, and refresh behavior
generic CLI entrypoint for run, resume, and refresh
core engine package, prompts, and schemas as a single directory attachment; only the package marker file is excluded
executable-spec tests for loader, workflow, review-bundle, and proof-pack behavior; development-only eval and pack-self tests are excluded
this pack's real scaffold surfaces, excluding the corpus files already attached as primary inputs

reference_context.notes: bounded proof pack showing one-pass, two-pass, reviewed three-stage, tool-profile, and sidecar authoring patterns
